name: Dialog (Modal)
description: A window overlaid on the primary window that traps focus and prevents user interaction with content outside the active dialog until it is closed.

keyboard_interactions.action: Moves focus to next tabbable element inside the dialog; wraps from last to first
Moves focus to previous tabbable element inside the dialog; wraps from first to last

roles.description: Identifies the element as a dialog

required_attributes.description: Accessible name, preferably referencing a visible dialog title

optional_attributes.description: References descriptive content within the dialog

notes: Focus must be trapped inside the dialog — Tab/Shift+Tab must not escape
On open, set focus to the first focusable element or a static element for long content
On close, return focus to the element that invoked the dialog
Content outside the dialog should be inert (use the inert attribute or aria-hidden='true')
For destructive actions, focus the least destructive action button
